_meta.name: Checkpoint backup + naming + rotation + promotion + manifest policy SSOT (E1-E5,E7)
_meta.description: Single source of truth for ckpt label routing, R2 prefix, naming convention, rotation cleanup, promotion gates, and sha256 manifest. Read by scripts/ckpt_{backup_hook,name_lint,rotation,promote,manifest}.hexa.

production.rationale: Permanent R2 retention. Random ckpts must pass promotion gate before this label can be assigned.

experiment.rationale: Default per decisions.json ckpt_label_default. Pod-lifetime only — H100 idle deletion sweeps these. NO R2 upload.

archive.rationale: Cold storage prefix. Eligible for rotation cleanup after 30 days. Used for failed/superseded runs we want to keep around.

forbidden_patterns.reason: feedback_no_version_in_filename — no v2/v14/v15 in ckpt filenames; use round+step
ambiguous — use explicit step number (e.g. step_50000) instead of 'final'
scratch/temporary names should not reach R2 ckpt prefix

sidecar_metadata.rationale: Hook reads this side-car to derive R2 prefix + label without arg-parsing. Trainer must emit it on every save.

rclone.credentials_note: rclone reads from ~/.config/rclone/rclone.conf — DO NOT inline credentials in this file or any hexa script

idempotency.rationale: Hook touches this marker after successful upload. Subsequent runs/resumes skip dirs containing the marker.
idempotency.partial_rationale: Hook touches this BEFORE upload. If found alone (without .r2_uploaded), prior upload was interrupted — hook re-uploads.

_meta.description: Experiment ckpt auto-purge rules. Run by scripts/ckpt_rotation.hexa.

rotation.production_purge_rationale: NEVER — production ckpts are permanent R2 objects

_meta.description: Promotion gate — measurement pass required before production label. Run by scripts/ckpt_promote.hexa.

gates.name: hire_sim_pass
gates.description: Must be true in ckpt_meta.json sidecar

gates.name: naming_lint
gates.description: No ERROR-level violations from ckpt_name_lint logic (v\d+ forbidden)

_meta.description: R2 manifest + integrity check (sha256). Generated by ckpt_backup_hook.hexa on upload, standalone tool at scripts/ckpt_manifest.hexa.

manifest.generated_by: scripts/ckpt_backup_hook.hexa (auto on upload) or scripts/ckpt_manifest.hexa generate
manifest.upload_rationale: Manifest uploaded to R2 alongside ckpt files. Downloader verifies with sha256sum -c.

enforcement.reject_unlabeled_rationale: Default to experiment to avoid blocking smoke runs. Use linter to catch missing labels at promotion time.
